name: m-project-2
description: A lightweight to-do web app where users can manage tasks by category. Users can create, view, update, and delete tasks. Each task has a title, description, due date, and category. Includes secure user authentication and persistent task storage.

scripts.setup: npm run setup-backend && npm run setup-frontend
scripts.setup-all: npm run setup-backend && npm run setup-backend-py && npm run setup-frontend
